scripts.build:app-builder: pnpm --filter ./packages/common... build && pnpm --filter ./packages/platform-center... build && pnpm --filter ./apps/app-builder... devops_build
scripts.build:devops-app-builder: npm run build --workspace=@onebase/common && npm run build --workspace=@onebase/platform-center && npm run devops_build --workspace=app-builder
